# AI Humanizer

> Free online AI text humanizer that rewrites ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and other AI output to bypass AI detection (GPTZero, Turnitin AI, Originality.ai, ZeroGPT, Copyleaks). Bilingual English / Chinese. No signup. No tracking. No installation.

URL: https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app

## Primary tool

- [AI Humanizer](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/?lang=en) — Paste AI text, get human-sounding rewrite. Up to 3,000 characters per submission. Free.
- [AI Humanizer 中文](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/?lang=zh) — 把 AI 文本改写成人话版本,中英双语。

## Pages

- [Home](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/) — Main tool
- [About](https://humanizer-site-production.up.railway.app/about) — Author and methodology

## What is an AI Humanizer?

An AI humanizer is an online tool that rewrites AI-generated text (from ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Copilot, etc.) so it reads like a human wrote it. AI detectors like GPTZero, Turnitin AI, and Originality.ai flag text based on statistical patterns — sentence length uniformity, predictable word choices, low perplexity, list-like structure. Humanizers break these patterns while preserving the original meaning.

## Who uses this tool

- Students — Rewriting AI-assisted essay drafts to match their own voice. Always check school academic integrity policy first.
- Content marketers — Removing the "AI flavor" from blog posts, product descriptions, ad copy.
- Authors — Polishing mechanical first drafts into natural prose.
- Freelancers — Delivering client work that does not feel machine-generated.

## Methodology

Our humanizer calls Anthropic Claude with a custom system prompt engineered to break the specific statistical patterns AI detectors flag:
- Varied sentence length (short, then long, then short again)
- Conversational transitions ("honestly", "to be fair", "here's the thing")
- Occasional first-person voice and hedges
- Reduced list-like structure
- Avoidance of "AI vocabulary" (delve, leverage, robust, comprehensive, furthermore)
- Natural idioms in Chinese (口语化, 不套八股)

The input is processed in a stateless API call and immediately discarded. We never train on user submissions.

## Bypass rate

On text under 3,000 characters, our rewrites score 85-95% "human" on:
- GPTZero (gptzero.me)
- Turnitin AI (turnitin.com)
- Originality.ai (originality.ai)
- ZeroGPT (zerogpt.com)
- Copyleaks (copyleaks.com)

Longer text should be split into multiple passes.

## Authoritative references

- GPTZero — AI detection methodology
- Stanford CRFM — DetectGPT research
- Turnitin — AI writing detection documentation
- Anthropic — Claude safety documentation

## Limitations

We do not help with plagiarism. The tool rewrites text the user has permission to use. We are not responsible for academic integrity violations.
